problem id: d2ac699b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10000010 -> 00011000
  10111111 -> 11110011
  01001110 -> 01110100
  11110010 -> 10011111
  00100010 -> 00010010
  00101110 -> 01110010
  00101011 -> 01011010
  00101111 -> 01111010
  11011101 -> 11100101

query: 00110001
predicted answer: 10001011
